seo.title: How will the Japanese Yen Fare in 2026?
seo.description: USD/JPY remains one of the most volatile forex pairs, driven by interest rate differentials, central bank policies, and global risk sentiment. Discover the conflicting outlook for the yen in 2026 and the key factors traders should monitor to navigate the pair.

title: How will the Japanese Yen Fare in 2026?
author: Blackwell Research Team
description: USD/JPY remains one of the most volatile forex pairs, driven by interest rate differentials, central bank policies, and global risk sentiment. This article breaks down the conflicting outlook for the yen in 2026 and the key factors traders should monitor to navigate the pair.
